prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Ford Cosworth DFV 3.0L V8 (F1-spec, ~485 HP in 1974 trim)** with a **Hewland FG400 5-speed transaxle** and **AP Racing 4-piston calipers** for F1-grade braking performance. The DFV will be mated to a **custom MATRA-designed magnesium bellhousing** to retain the MS84’s rear-engine layout while improving weight distribution.

Full **TIG-welded chrome-moly tubular spaceframe reinforcement** by **Progress Autosport** (UK) to handle the DFV’s torque, paired with **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers** (custom valving for F2/F3-spec damping) and **Tillet B12 carbon fiber seats** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** for driver retention.

Custom **3D-printed titanium intake plenums** (designed by **MATRA Sports Heritage Division**) to optimize airflow for the DFV’s downdraft Weber 48IDA carburetors, paired with a **Magneti Marelli electronic ignition system** (F1-spec, 1974) and **NGK B9EGV racing spark plugs** for high-RPM stability.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny/Pandem MS84-specific widebody kit** (carbon fiber, hand-laid by **Liberty Walk Japan**), extending the rear fenders by 80mm to accommodate **OZ Racing Superleggera LM 13x18-inch wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (305/645R18)** for vintage F1 proportions with modern grip.

**Custom livery by **Eagle Le Mans** (UK), replicating the 1974 MATRA-Simca MS670B Le Mans winner’s **blue/white/red stripe scheme** with **3M 1080 vinyl wrap** (matte finish) and **hand-painted gold leaf accents** on the roll hoop and sidepods for period-correct detail.

**Full carbon fiber underbody diffuser** (designed by **AeroTech UK**) with **active Gurney flaps** (electronically adjustable via cockpit switch) to balance downforce at high speeds, paired with a **custom MATRA-branded titanium exhaust system** (dual 2.5-inch outlets, **Akrapovič titanium mufflers**) exiting through the rear valance.
